Example_EN: Please clear the table after dinner tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚晚饭后请清理餐桌。

Example_EN: Please speak clearly so everyone can hear you.
Example_CN: 请说清楚，好让每个人都能听见。

Example_EN: The bank clerk helped me open a new account.
Example_CN: 银行职员帮我开了新账户。

Example_EN: Please click on the blue button to continue.
Example_CN: 请点击蓝色按钮继续。

Example_EN: She has a meeting with an important client today.
Example_CN: 她今天要见一位重要客户。

Example_EN: Climate change is an important topic at school.
Example_CN: 气候变化是学校里的重要话题。
MemoryTip: climate：长期气候，不是单日天气。

Example_EN: Please clean the window with a soft cloth.
Example_CN: 请用软布擦窗户。

Example_EN: The police found a clue near the broken window.
Example_CN: 警方在破窗附近发现一条线索。

Example_EN: Our football coach asks us to train harder.
Example_CN: 足球教练要求我们更刻苦训练。

Example_EN: In the past people burned coal to heat houses.
Example_CN: 过去人们烧煤给房子取暖。

Example_EN: They spent a week along the south coast.
Example_CN: 他们在南海岸待了一周。

Example_EN: Please enter the postcode carefully on the form.
Example_CN: 请在表格上仔细填写邮编。

Collocation: coin in pocket;toss a coin;gold coin
Example_EN: I found a coin on the classroom floor today.
Example_CN: 我今天在教室地板上发现一枚硬币。

Example_EN: The old wooden bridge collapsed after heavy rain.
Example_CN: 大雨后那座旧木桥倒塌了。

Example_EN: He turned up the collar of his coat in the wind.
Example_CN: 刮风时他把外套衣领竖了起来。

Example_EN: I asked a colleague for help with the report.
Example_CN: 我请一位同事帮忙写报告。

Example_EN: She likes to collect stamps from different countries.
Example_CN: 她喜欢收集各国邮票。
MemoryTip: collect：把分散的东西聚到一起。

Example_EN: He has a large collection of old books at home.
Example_CN: 他家里有大量旧书收藏。

Example_EN: She writes a weekly column for the local paper.
Example_CN: 她为本地报纸写每周专栏。

Example_EN: Success needs a combination of hard work and luck.
Example_CN: 成功需要努力与运气的结合。

Collocation: combine with;combine A and B;combine efforts
Example_EN: Please combine the flour with the eggs carefully.
Example_CN: 请把面粉和鸡蛋仔细混合。
MemoryTip: combine：把两样（或多样）合在一起。

Example_EN: We watched a funny comedy film last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚我们看了一部搞笑喜剧电影。

Example_EN: Friends can comfort you when you feel sad.
Example_CN: 难过时朋友可以安慰你。

Example_EN: The boy reads a comic book every evening.
Example_CN: 男孩每天晚上读漫画书。

Collocation: give a command;in command;command of English
Example_EN: The officer gave a clear command to the soldiers.
Example_CN: 军官向士兵下达了明确命令。

Example_EN: Do you have any comment on this new plan?
Example_CN: 你对这项新计划有什么评论吗？

Example_EN: There was a long commercial break during the match.
Example_CN: 比赛中有很长的广告休息时间。

Collocation: sales commission;set up a commission;commission of
Example_EN: She earns a commission on every car she sells.
Example_CN: 她每卖出一辆车都能拿到佣金。

Example_EN: You should not commit a crime of any kind.
Example_CN: 你不应犯任何罪行。

Example_EN: Teaching needs a strong commitment to students.
Example_CN: 教学需要对学业生产生强烈投入。

Example_EN: She is on the committee for the school party.
Example_CN: 她在学校晚会的委员会里。

Example_EN: We communicate with friends by phone and email.
Example_CN: 我们通过电话和邮件与朋友交流。

Example_EN: Good communication is important in every team.
Example_CN: 良好沟通在每个团队都很重要。

Example_EN: Volunteers help older people in our community.
Example_CN: 志愿者在社区帮助老年人。

Example_EN: In comparison with last year, sales are higher.
Example_CN: 与去年相比，销量更高。

Example_EN: Schools compete with each other in sports matches.
Example_CN: 学校在体育比赛中互相竞争。

Example_EN: She entered a writing competition last month.
Example_CN: 她上个月参加了写作比赛。

Example_EN: Football is a competitive sport at our school.
Example_CN: 足球在我们学校是一项竞技运动。
MemoryTip: compete → competitive：好竞争的、有竞争力。

Example_EN: Customers complain about the slow service here.
Example_CN: 顾客抱怨这里服务太慢。

Example_EN: He made a formal complaint to the hotel manager.
Example_CN: 他向酒店经理正式投诉。

Example_EN: The two answers are completely different from each other.
Example_CN: 这两个答案完全不同。

Example_EN: This maths problem is too complex for beginners.
Example_CN: 这道数学题对初学者太复杂。
MemoryTip: complex：由许多部分构成而难懂。

Example_EN: The instructions look complicated at first sight.
Example_CN: 说明书乍一看很复杂。

Example_EN: Trust is a key component of any friendship.
Example_CN: 信任是任何友谊的关键组成部分。

Collocation: compose music;compose a letter;be composed of
Example_EN: She likes to compose music in her free time.
Example_CN: 她空闲时喜欢作曲。

Example_EN: Water is a compound of hydrogen and oxygen.
Example_CN: 水是氢和氧的化合物。

Example_EN: Please read this comprehensive guide before you start.
Example_CN: 开始前请阅读这份全面指南。

Example_EN: Please concentrate on your work until the end.
Example_CN: 请把注意力集中在工作上直到结束。

Example_EN: Noise can destroy your concentration when you study.
Example_CN: 噪声会破坏你学习时的注意力。

Example_EN: The teacher explained the basic concept of gravity.
Example_CN: 老师讲解了重力的基本概念。

Example_EN: Parents often feel concern about exam results.
Example_CN: 家长常为考试成绩担心。

Example_EN: We can conclude that the plan was a success.
Example_CN: 我们可以得出结论：计划成功了。

Collocation: in conclusion;draw a conclusion;come to a conclusion
Example_EN: In conclusion, we need more practice this week.
Example_CN: 总之，我们本周需要更多练习。

Example_EN: Please give a concrete example to explain the rule.
Example_CN: 请举一个具体例子来解释这条规则。

Example_EN: The used bike is still in good condition.
Example_CN: 这辆二手自行车状况仍很好。

Example_EN: Scientists will conduct research on clean energy.
Example_CN: 科学家将对清洁能源开展研究。
MemoryTip: 动词 kənˈdʌkt；名词 ˈkɒndʌkt 表行为。

Example_EN: She is speaking at an education conference today.
Example_CN: 她今天在教育会议上发言。

Example_EN: Practice will help you build confidence in English.
Example_CN: 练习会帮你建立英语自信。

Example_EN: She felt confident before the final exam.
Example_CN: 期末考试前她感到自信。

Example_EN: Please confirm your email address on this form.
Example_CN: 请在表格上确认你的邮箱地址。

Example_EN: There was a conflict between the two neighbours.
Example_CN: 两位邻居之间发生了冲突。

Collocation: confuse A with B;confuse someone;easy to confuse
Example_EN: Do not confuse these two similar English words.
Example_CN: 不要把这两个相似的英语单词弄混。

Example_EN: I felt confused about the new homework rules.
Example_CN: 我对新的作业规则感到困惑。

Example_EN: The street map was very confusing for visitors.
Example_CN: 这张街道地图让游客很困惑。

Example_EN: Congratulations on winning first prize in the contest!
Example_CN: 恭喜你在比赛中获得一等奖！

Collocation: connect to;connect with;connect A to B
Example_EN: Please connect the cable to the computer first.
Example_CN: 请先把电缆连接到电脑。

Example_EN: The internet connection is too slow in this room.
Example_CN: 这个房间网速太慢。

Example_EN: She was conscious of everyone looking at her.
Example_CN: 她意识到所有人都在看着她。

Example_EN: As a consequence of the storm, trains were late.
Example_CN: 风暴导致火车晚点。

Example_EN: A conservative estimate puts the cost at one thousand pounds.
Example_CN: 保守估计费用为一千英镑。

Example_EN: Please consider carefully before you decide tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚做决定前请仔细考虑。

Example_EN: She spent a considerable amount of time on practice.
Example_CN: 她花了相当多时间练习。

Example_EN: Your plan is still under consideration this week.
Example_CN: 你的计划本周仍在考虑中。

Example_EN: The team consists of twelve young players.
Example_CN: 这支队伍由十二名年轻球员组成。

Example_EN: Her results have been consistent all year.
Example_CN: 她的成绩一整年都很稳定一致。

Example_EN: There was constant noise from the busy road.
Example_CN: 繁忙马路上传来持续的噪声。

Example_EN: He constantly checks his phone during the lesson.
Example_CN: 他上课时不停看手机。

Collocation: construct a building;construct a sentence;construct from
Example_EN: Workers will construct a new library next year.
Example_CN: 工人们明年将建造一座新图书馆。

Example_EN: The new bridge is still under construction.
Example_CN: 新桥仍在施工中。

Collocation: consult a doctor;consult with;consult a map
Example_EN: You should consult a doctor about your headache.
Example_CN: 你应该就头痛咨询医生。

Example_EN: Consumer rights protect people who buy products.
Example_CN: 消费者权益保护购物的人。

Example_EN: Please contact me if you need any help.
Example_CN: 如需帮助请联系我。

Example_EN: This box contains old letters from my grandmother.
Example_CN: 这个盒子装着祖母的旧信。

Example_EN: Please put the leftovers in a plastic container.
Example_CN: 请把剩菜放进塑料容器。

Example_EN: She prefers contemporary art to older paintings.
Example_CN: 她喜欢当代艺术胜过更早的画作。
MemoryTip: con + temporary：属于同一时代的现代。

Example_EN: Please check the content of your bag carefully.
Example_CN: 请仔细检查包里的内容。
MemoryTip: 名词 ˈkɒntent；形容词 kənˈtent 表满足。

Example_EN: He won first prize in the writing contest.
Example_CN: 他在写作比赛中获得一等奖。

Collocation: in this context;historical context;out of context
Example_EN: Please guess the word from the context of the sentence.
Example_CN: 请根据句子语境猜测词义。

Collocation: African continent;on the continent;across the continent
Example_EN: Asia is the largest continent in the world.
Example_CN: 亚洲是世界上最大的大陆。

Example_EN: Please continue reading until the end of the page.
Example_CN: 请继续读到这一页结束。

Example_EN: There was continuous rain throughout the weekend.
Example_CN: 整个周末雨下个不停。

Example_EN: Please read the contract carefully before you sign.
Example_CN: 签字前请仔细阅读合同。

Example_EN: In contrast to yesterday, today is warm and sunny.
Example_CN: 与昨天形成对比，今天温暖晴朗。

Example_EN: Everyone can contribute ideas to the team project.
Example_CN: 每个人都可以为团队项目贡献想法。

Example_EN: She made a valuable contribution to the research.
Example_CN: 她为这项研究做出了宝贵贡献。

Example_EN: Please keep your dog under control in the park.
Example_CN: 请在公园里管好你的狗。

Example_EN: This shop is convenient for people living nearby.
Example_CN: 这家店对附近居民很方便。

Example_EN: By convention, guests arrive a little early.
Example_CN: 按惯例，客人会稍早到达。

Example_EN: He prefers conventional methods to new ones.
Example_CN: 他更喜欢传统方法而非新方法。

Example_EN: Please convert these pounds into euros for me.
Example_CN: 请帮我把这些英镑换成欧元。
MemoryTip: convert：从一种形式转为另一种。
